extortion.description: Femar Group is a multifaceted company based in Catania, specializing in various sectors including special services, logistics, energy, and pharmaceuticals. The group encompasses several subsidiaries such as Femar Servizi Speciali, Femar Logistica, and Silverpharma, among others. Their diverse offerings cater to a wide range of clients looking for comprehensive solutions in their respective industries. With a strong presence in the industrial zone, Femar Group aims to deliver quality services and products to meet the needs of its clientele
